$meta.purpose: Define keyframes, transition rates, and rules of restraint regarding motion

presets.animate-pulse: pulse animation for highlight tags or brand sparkles icons

rules.name: Restrained transitions
rules.rule: Interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu options) must use rapid color transitions (duration-150) rather than long, sluggish transitions to maintain a fast responsive feel.
rules.evidence: Hover styles on Header buttons, SupportGrid cards, and DropdownSelect buttons use transition-colors duration-150.

rules.name: Page and overlay entrances
rules.rule: Entering pages or popup overlays must slide and fade into view subtly (slide-in-from-top-1 for dropdown menus, slide-in-from-bottom-2 for card boxes) rather than rotating or bouncing.
rules.evidence: Observed on DropdownSelect options opening, user profile settings list, and BrowseByTopic box loading.

rules.name: Slow floating decorations
rules.rule: Restrict dynamic keyframe movements (such as float or scroll animations) strictly to illustration graphics, and ensure they run at slow rates (4s to 5s) to avoid distracting the operator.
rules.evidence: float-1, float-2, and float-3 keyframe declarations are bound under globals.css and used for illustration/background details.
